design.reference_notes:
[House Cleaning & Handyman Services]: Handy uses a clean, high-contrast teal brand colour paired with approachable photography of uniformed workers to establish professionalism and trust. The service cards employ a consistent icon-plus-label pattern with green icon backgrounds that create visual anchoring without overwhelming whitespace. The minimal hero copy and immediate service entry points prioritise conversion efficiency over storytelling.
[Linear – The system for product development]: Linear employs an ultra-minimal dark aesthetic with near-black backgrounds and low-contrast gray typography that creates a sophisticated, almost cinematic restraint. The oversized display heading with extremely light weight communicates confidence without aggression, letting whitespace do the heavy lifting. The product screenshot below the fold is deliberately blurred/dark, drawing focus to the typography hierarchy and reinforcing an editorial, premium software identity.
[The AI workspace that works for you. | Notion]: Notion uses extreme typographic contrast — a massive, heavy sans-serif headline paired with lightweight body copy — to communicate confidence without visual clutter. The product UI screenshot grounds the abstract value proposition in concrete reality, while the trusted-brand logo strip provides credibility through association rather than statistics. The near-zero use of colour forces attention onto copy and hierarchy, making the single blue CTA button the only deliberate chromatic signal on the page.
